title: Workflow - create from template and assign owners

posts.author: ClareHughes (Clare Fox)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

When creating a workflow that has ‘create from template’, you can add individuals as owners or members on the board you’re creating - we need to be able to add teams as well. Whilst it’ll let you add a team on the workflow, when the workflow runs it doesn’t actually add the team.

What are you trying to achieve

To have a workflow that creates a board from template with different teams assigned as owners and members.
